{
  "claims": [
    "Medi-Cal ran out of money in March.",
    "Governor Gavin Newsom needed a $6.2 billion bailout to keep Medi-Cal afloat.",
    "Medi-Cal's rising costs are driving California's structural deficit.",
    "Newsom's expansion to cover illegal immigrants will cost $12 billion this year alone.",
    "There is no funding plan and no accountability for Newsom's expansion of Medi-Cal.",
    "California is heading toward a two-tiered healthcare system.",
    "Citizens face work requirements in Washington's Medicaid reforms, while non-citizens receive full Medi-Cal coverage with no work requirement.",
    "Assembly Democrats blocked an audit that could expose where billions in Medi-Cal spending are going.",

    "Newsom needed an additional $3.44 billion loan to pay the bills in Medi-Cal.",
